, 1x Organza Dupatta

name: Indigo Radiance – 3-Piece Stitched Silk Suit with Gold Brocade Trim
short_description:
Stitching: Fully Stitched & Ready-to-Wear

Fabric: Premium High-Density Silk with a subtle satin finish (Shirt & Trousers)

Dupatta: Matching Navy Sheer Net with Delicate Sequin Spray

Package Includes: 1x Silk Shirt, 1x Silk Trousers, 1x Net Dupatta
description:
Embrace timeless sophistication with our 'Indigo Radiance' 3-piece silk suit. This ensemble is rendered in a deep midnight navy, crafted from luxury silk that provides a sleek and polished silhouette.

The shirt features a modern split-V neckline and is beautifully accented with intricate gold brocade lace along the cuffs and hemline. It is paired with coordinating silk trousers and a matching sheer net dupatta, which is delicately finished with a light spray of shimmering sequins for a touch of evening glamour. A refined choice for formal dinners, weddings, and high-end festive celebrations.

name: Rosewood Elegance 3-Piece Formal Suit
short_description: A graceful rosewood satin 3-piece stitched suit featuring a minimalist kurta with delicate embellishment, straight trousers, and a soft net dupatta. Designed for modern elegance, this outfit is perfect for semi-formal gatherings, festive occasions, and evening wear.
description:
Rosewood Elegance 3-Piece Formal Suit is a timeless ensemble crafted for women who appreciate understated luxury and refined style. The outfit features a beautifully tailored straight-cut kurta made from premium satin fabric in a sophisticated rosewood shade. The smooth texture and subtle sheen of the fabric enhance the elegance of the overall design.

The kurta showcases minimalist styling with delicate embellishments along the sleeves and hemline, creating a balanced look that is both modern and traditional. The clean neckline and tailored silhouette provide a polished appearance suitable for formal and festive occasions.

The set includes matching straight-cut trousers, designed for comfort and a sleek fit, ensuring ease of movement while maintaining a refined aesthetic.

Completing the ensemble is a lightweight net dupatta adorned with subtle sparkle detailing, adding a touch of graceful charm and fluidity to the outfit. The soft drape of the dupatta enhances the overall sophistication of the attire.

This outfit is ideal for evening events, festive celebrations, family gatherings, and formal occasions, offering a perfect blend of elegance, comfort, and modern style.

name: Blush Petal Cape Style Girls Formal Set
short_description: A charming blush pink satin girls formal outfit featuring a stylish cape overlay top paired with a flowing maxi skirt. Designed with delicate golden trims and soft fabric, this elegant set is perfect for festive occasions, weddings, and formal gatherings.
description:
The Blush Petal Cape Style Girls Formal Set is a graceful and stylish outfit crafted to bring elegance and comfort together for young fashion lovers. Designed in a soft blush pink shade, this outfit reflects a delicate and refined aesthetic ideal for special occasions.

The top features a unique cape-style overlay made from sheer organza fabric, giving the outfit a sophisticated layered look. The cape drapes gently over the shoulders and is finished with subtle golden piping that enhances the overall elegance of the design.

Under the cape, the satin top includes a round neckline with decorative button detailing, adding a classic touch while maintaining a modern silhouette. The half sleeves are finished with matching golden trims that complement the rest of the outfit beautifully.

Paired with the top is a long flowing satin skirt, designed with a comfortable fit and elegant drape. The skirt features a minimal design with golden trim at the hem, creating a coordinated and polished look.

This ensemble is perfect for weddings, Eid celebrations, festive events, birthday parties, and formal family gatherings, ensuring both style and comfort for young girls.

name: Sunset Bloom Girls Festive Co-Ord Set
short_description: A vibrant girls festive co-ord set featuring a beautifully embroidered sleeveless top paired with bright pleated palazzo pants and a matching potli bag. Designed with colorful floral motifs and a lively sunset orange palette, this outfit is perfect for festive celebrations, weddings, and party wear.
description:
The Sunset Bloom Girls Festive Co-Ord Set is a cheerful and stylish ensemble designed to bring playful elegance to special occasions. The outfit combines vibrant colors with intricate embroidery, making it a standout choice for festive events and celebrations.

The sleeveless top features a soft ivory base adorned with colorful floral and paisley embroidery inspired by traditional South Asian patterns. The detailed threadwork in bright hues of orange, red, green, and gold creates a lively and artistic look that enhances the charm of the outfit.

Paired with the embroidered top are flowy pleated palazzo pants in a striking sunset orange shade. The lightweight pleated fabric creates beautiful movement while ensuring comfort for active kids. The wide-leg design adds a modern festive flair while maintaining a traditional aesthetic.

Adding an extra touch of elegance, the outfit includes a matching decorative potli bag in the same vibrant orange tone with floral detailing. This accessory completes the festive look and adds a fun element for young girls.

This outfit is ideal for Eid celebrations, wedding festivities, birthday parties, cultural events, and festive gatherings, offering both style and comfort for all-day wear.
